_comment: Pinned default 9-pair subset for scripts/evals/run.mjs — one job per archetype from scripts/fixtures/perf/. Pinned once so two runs never disagree on what 'the default fixture set' means (see docs/plans/2026-07-08-resume-eval-harness-design.md). Selection: first-listed job per archetype cohort. Spot-checked 3 cohorts (swe-mid, accountant, hvac-tech) by hand before wiring this in — job postings each named >=3 concrete skills/requirements, resumes each had >=2 plausibly relevant bullets.
